modules.name: journal
modules.description: Resizable rich-text notes canvas — markdown formatting, headings, lists, and export.

modules.name: tidy
modules.description: Hide or fade individual modules and cables, independent of global cable opacity.

modules.name: capture
modules.description: Export PNG rack snapshots and copy a plugin/version inventory for sharing.

modules.name: grab+
modules.description: Smart stereo recorder: auto one-shot (grab), rolling-buffer take, and silence-gated ring (snip), with a dual-action rec button.

modules.name: qmap
modules.description: Eight CV inputs that touch-map to any parameter — per-slot uni/bipolar, plus a master button for one-shot full-rig assignment.

modules.name: qmod+
modules.description: 4 HP, 14-slot modulation source with five per-column modes (random triggers, triggered S+H, smooth random, S+H, LFO). Links into a Q-array with qmap / qmod.

modules.name: qmod
modules.description: 6 HP, 14-slot modulation source: per-column modes plus per-row log-scaled rate knobs to hand-tune each pair. Links into a Q-array with qmap / qmod+.
